title: BlackBerry Stock Guidance And Forecast
text: BlackBerry issued FY2027 guidance showing strong expectations for continued growth and profitability. The company expects fiscal year 2027 revenue in the range of $584-611 million, representing 6-11% year-over-year growth. FY2027 non-GAAP EPS guidance was issued in the range of $0.15-0.19. Q1 2027 EPS guidance was provided at $0.02-0.03. Q1 2027 revenue guidance was issued at $132.0-140.0 million compared to analyst consensus of $129.8 million. The guidance reflects management's confidence in continued execution and growth in its QNX automotive, Secure Communications, and IoT segments. Full-year fiscal 2026 revenue guidance was raised to $508-538 million with Adjusted EBITDA between $72-87 million. Company-wide FY26 revenue guidance was raised, and secure communications revenue guidance was raised by $4 million.
